---
title: ""
listing: false
---

```{=html}

<!-- ====== HERO SECTION ====== -->
<div class="hero-section">
<div class="hero-content container">

<div class="row align-items-center g-5">

<!-- Left: Text -->
<div class="col-lg-7">

<div class="hero-badge animate-in">
<span class="pulse-dot"></span>
Available for Opportunities
</div>

<h1 class="display-3 fw-bold mt-3 mb-3 animate-in animate-delay-1" style="font-family: var(--om-font-heading); line-height: 1.1;">
Odey <span class="gradient-text">Mofokeng</span>
</h1>

<p class="fs-4 mb-2 animate-in animate-delay-2" style="font-weight: 500; color: var(--om-primary);">
Actuarial Science & Mathematical Statistics Graduate
</p>

<p class="mb-4 animate-in animate-delay-3" style="max-width: 540px; color: #7A6C5E; font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1.7;">
Transforming complex spatial and statistical data into actionable insights.
Expert in <strong>R</strong>, <strong>SQL</strong>, and <strong>predictive modelling</strong> with award-winning research experience
in geostatistics and actuarial science.
</p>

<div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-3 mb-4 animate-in animate-delay-4">
<a href="projects.qmd" class="btn-primary-custom">
View Projects <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i>
</a>
<a href="contact.qmd" class="btn-outline-custom">
Get in Touch
</a>
</div>

<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-4 mt-3 animate-in animate-delay-4" style="color: #8B7355;">
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/odey-mofokeng-94b043238/" target="_blank" style="font-size: 1.4rem; color: #8B7355;" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i></a>
<a href="https://github.com/odeymofokeng-wits" target="_blank" style="font-size: 1.4rem; color: #8B7355;" aria-label="GitHub"><i class="fab fa-github"></i></a>
<a href="mailto:mofokengodey@gmail.com" style="font-size: 1.4rem; color: #8B7355;" aria-label="Email"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i></a>
<span style="font-size: .9rem;">📍 Lenasia South, Gauteng</span>
</div>

</div>

<!-- Right: Stats Cards -->
<div class="col-lg-5">
<div class="row g-3">
<div class="col-6">
<div class="stat-card">
<div class="stat-value" style="color: var(--om-primary);">7</div>
<div class="stat-label">Actuarial Exams</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="col-6">
<div class="stat-card">
<div class="stat-value" style="color: var(--om-secondary);">1st</div>
<div class="stat-label">SASA Prize</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="col-6">
<div class="stat-card">
<div class="stat-value" style="color: #7c3aed;">MSc</div>
<div class="stat-label">In Progress</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="col-6">
<div class="stat-card">
<div class="stat-value" style="color: #5C9A4F;">84%</div>
<div class="stat-label">Honours Project</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ====== FEATURED PROJECTS PREVIEW ====== -->
<section class="page-section reveal">
<div class="container">

<div class="section-header">
<h2>Featured Work</h2>
<p>A selection of my research and analytical projects spanning geostatistics, survival analysis, and survey methodology.</p>
</div>

<div class="project-grid">

<!-- Project 1 -->
<div class="project-card">
<div class="card-header gradient-blue">
<i class="fas fa-map-marked-alt"></i>
</div>
<div class="card-body">
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start mb-2">
<span class="card-tag" style="background: rgba(184,92,56,.1); color: var(--om-primary);">Spatial Statistics</span>
<span style="color: var(--om-secondary);"><i class="fas fa-trophy"></i></span>
</div>
<h3 class="card-title">Regression Kriging for Wastewater Surveillance</h3>
<p class="card-desc">Honours research project analysing spatial wastewater data using geostatistical modelling in R. Awarded 1st Prize at SASA Conference and the Peter Fridjhon Gold Medal.</p>
<div class="card-skills">
<span class="skill-pill">R</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Geostatistics</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Kriging</span>
</div>
<a href="projects.qmd#regression-kriging" class="card-link">View Project <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Project 2 -->
<div class="project-card">
<div class="card-header gradient-purple">
<i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i>
</div>
<div class="card-body">
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start mb-2">
<span class="card-tag" style="background: rgba(139,94,60,.1); color: #8B5E3C;">Data Competition</span>
<span style="color: #8B7355; font-size: .75rem;">2025–2026</span>
</div>
<h3 class="card-title">ASA DataFest 2025 & Facilitator 2026</h3>
<p class="card-desc">Team-based analysis of large real-world datasets. Selected as Facilitator for ASA DataFest 2026, mentoring teams and guiding data analysis workflows.</p>
<div class="card-skills">
<span class="skill-pill">EDA</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Teamwork</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Visualization</span>
</div>
<a href="projects.qmd#asa-datafest" class="card-link">View Project <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Project 3 -->
<div class="project-card">
<div class="card-header gradient-orange">
<i class="fas fa-random"></i>
</div>
<div class="card-body">
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start mb-2">
<span class="card-tag" style="background: rgba(160,82,45,.1); color: #A0522D;">Survey Design</span>
<span style="color: var(--om-secondary); font-size: .75rem;"><i class="fas fa-star"></i> Top</span>
</div>
<h3 class="card-title">Applied Sampling — EV Adoption</h3>
<p class="card-desc">Top-performing mini-project estimating electric vehicle adoption using stratified sampling with 23.75% variance reduction and Bayesian estimation.</p>
<div class="card-skills">
<span class="skill-pill">Sampling</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Bayesian</span>
<span class="skill-pill">R</span>
</div>
<a href="projects.qmd#applied-sampling" class="card-link">View Project <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="text-center mt-5">
<a href="projects.qmd" class="btn-outline-custom">View All Projects <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ms-1"></i></a>
</div>

</div>
</section>

<!-- ====== QUICK SKILLS BAR ====== -->
<section class="page-section reveal" style="background: var(--om-gradient-subtle);">
<div class="container">

<div class="section-header">
<h2>At a Glance</h2>
<p>Core competencies built through rigorous academic training and applied research.</p>
</div>

<div class="row g-4">

<div class="col-md-4">
<div class="skill-category">
<h3><i class="fas fa-code" style="color: var(--om-primary);"></i> Programming</h3>
<div class="progress-bar-container">
<div class="progress-label"><span>R (tidyverse, ggplot2, caret)</span><span>95%</span></div>
<div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" style="width: 95%;"></div></div>
</div>
<div class="progress-bar-container">
<div class="progress-label"><span>SQL</span><span>85%</span></div>
<div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" style="width: 85%;"></div></div>
</div>
<div class="progress-bar-container">
<div class="progress-label"><span>Excel (Advanced)</span><span>90%</span></div>
<div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" style="width: 90%;"></div></div>
</div>
<div class="progress-bar-container">
<div class="progress-label"><span>Power BI</span><span>80%</span></div>
<div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" style="width: 80%;"></div></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-4">
<div class="skill-category">
<h3><i class="fas fa-brain" style="color: var(--om-secondary);"></i> Statistical Methods</h3>
<ul class="method-list">
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Regression Analysis</li>
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Spatial Statistics & Geostatistics</li>
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Predictive Modelling</li>
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Time Series Analysis</li>
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Survival Analysis</li>
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Bayesian Statistics</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-4">
<div class="skill-category">
<h3><i class="fas fa-briefcase" style="color: #7c3aed;"></i> Actuarial Exams</h3>
<div class="exam-grid">
<div class="exam-cell passed">A111</div>
<div class="exam-cell passed">A112</div>
<div class="exam-cell passed">A211</div>
<div class="exam-cell passed">A212</div>
<div class="exam-cell passed">A213</div>
<div class="exam-cell passed">A113</div>
<div class="exam-cell passed">N111</div>
<div class="exam-summary">7 Passed</div>
</div>
<p style="font-size: .75rem; color: #8B7355; margin-top: .75rem; margin-bottom: 0;">Professional Actuarial Exams (IFOA/ASSA)</p>
</div>
</div>

</div>

</div>
</section>


```
